wiki.summary: “deaf note” was partially previewed during Playboi Carti’s Rolling Loud Orlando set on May 9, 2026. The song would then be previewed the following night again during Ken Carson’s headlining set on May 10, 2026, this time previewing Playboi Carti’s full verse. On June 30th, 2026, Carson would later confirm with his producer skai that “deaf note” will appear on the project xperiment. Read more on Last.fm.
